titleStmt.title: SII 27.378: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 378. (A.R. No. 156 of 1933-34.) KURIJILI, PUNGANUR TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: South side of the boulder near the Veṅkaṭēśvarasvāmin temple.

This record registers a gift of land, situated in Guṇḍalahaḷḷi alias Narasihapura in Hode-nāḍu, as Kaṭṭugoḍage by Dēvapa, son of Koṇḍapa Timmaṇa, the sthānika of the Nārasihadēva temple, to Nārasihadēva, son of Alapa for digging a tank in the village which belonged to the temple of Kadiri Lakshmīnarasiṁha and bringing the surrounding lands under cultivation. The land was endowed under certain conditions in respect of the rate of produce to be paid by the tenant. A portion of the land was also given to the same person as dasavanda.
It is dated Śaka 1419, Naḷa, Vaiśākha ba. 10 corresponding to 1496 A.D., May 10, the Śaka year being current. But the details are not verifiable.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . keṟeya kaṭugoḍageya sādhanada prati . svastiśrī vijayādbhudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣa 1419 neya naḷa saṁvatsarada
da vayiśākha ba 10 lū śrīmatu Alapagaḷamakaḷu nārasihadēvagaḷige nārasiha dēvara stānikaru koṁḍapa tiṁmaṇagaḷa makaḷu dēvapagaḷū
koṭa kaṭṭugoḍageya sādhanada kramaveṁteṁdare naṁma kadiri lakṣimīnārasiha dēvara Amurutapaḍi nayivēdyake saluva hodenāḍoḷagaṇa
narasihapuravāda guṁḍalahaḷiya grāmavanū nānu nārasihadēvara nirūpadiṁda naṁbigaḷu Apaci Anatapagaḷige kāṇiyāciyāgi koṭadu
dēvara Amurutapaḍi nayivēdya kaṭaḷegeU paruva tithigaḷa kaṭaḷegū dēvara viśēṣa nayivēdyakeU gaṁdhada krayakeU paṁca
paṟuvadalū māḍuva sēve yiU muṁtāda paricārakara jītayiU muṁtāda sēvegaḷige māḍodake naṁbigaḷu yi taṁḍadavarigū neladara kāṇiyāciyāgi koṭa
guṁḍalana haḷiya grāmadalū hiriya keṟegepaḍuvalāda māvinahaḷavanū niṁmakayyalū dhanavanū yikki karukūli kaṁnekeṟeyanū kaṭisuva saṁmaṁdha niU Ā haḷadalū keṟeyanu kaṭisi keṟe
ge maṁṇanū bahaḷavāgi hāki kalukaṭeyanū kaṭi kallatūṁbanū yiki Ā tobige yiṭage rasavarga suṁṇasahayiki tuṁbanū jatanavāgi māḍi Ā keṟeyanū pūrayisi Ā keṟeyakeḷage Acukaṭina gadeyanū tidi Ā keṟeya
keḷage huṭidaṁthā Acakaṭana gadeyanū beḷada bhōga nālku bhōga māṁnyavāgi Anubhavisikoṁbiri Ā nālku bhōgau tuṁbidabaḷika nāunimage koḍuvada savaṁda Ā keṟeya keḷage huṭidaṁthā gadege voḷa dasavaṁdavāgi
hatake mūṟaṟavoḷa dasavaṁdada mariyādeyalū kaṭugoḍageyanū piṟeci Ā kaṭugoḍageya gadege Utama madhyama kanisavāgi tristānadalū śilāstāpanavanū māḍisikoḍu
veU yī keṟeya kaṭugoḍage māṁnyavāgi koṭaholanu yāga vyavasāyavamāḍi rāghiyabituva holadoḷage namage kabugoḍage koṭṭaholanu khaṁ . 0 tarisu
holadalū māṁnyavāgikoṭa holanu khaṁ . 0 Ubhayaṁ kha 1 khaṁḍuga holavanū kaṭugoḍeya māṁnyavāgi śilāsthāpanavanū māḍisi koḍuveU niṁma bhōga māṁnyada nālkubhōgada
voḷage Ā nīu nīu kaṭisida keṟege lūnamānavādare Ā keṟeyanū nīvē kaṭisikoṁḍu niṁmabhōgamāṁnyada gadeyanū nālkubhōga tegadu koṁbiriniṁma māṁnyada nālku bhōgalū tuṁbida baḷika Ā keṟege lēsu holleya
vādare Ā keṟeya keḷagaṇa gadeyamēle niṁma dasavaṁdada gade sahavāgi birāḍisi gadeyamēle rokabhatamanū variyaniki Attikeṟeyanū kaṭisuvelu niṁmakaṭu geḍageya gade holake naṁma sthānadiṁda baṁda tirunāḷa kāṇike
haḷadu hostu grāmaveca biṭi birāḍa sollage Āudū yilla Elli Elli matū muṁde niratidi haridu Eṣṭugade huṭidaru tidida tidida sthaḷadalū nālku beḷada bhōga māṁnyavanū Anubhavisi Ādakkū yī maryyāde dasavaṁdavanū
piṟucikoṁḍu mikkāda gadeyanū Eṁdeṁdigū niṁma sāgubaḷiyāgi naḍasibaheU sāgida gadege nere mariyādeyalli vāragutageyanū yikibahiri �yo keṟeyalū sāgida gadege sthānada bēḍige birāḍa bijavari biṭi solage
yidāudakū nimage saṁbaṁdhavilla nīu kaṭista keṟi dhruvajalavādare Aḍake teṁgu modalāda sthāvaragaḷanū niṁma kaṭu goḍageyalū sthāvaragaḷanū Iki nīvē Anubhavisikoṁbiri yā dasavaṁdake hatake mūṟaṟa voḷa dasavaṁda
da gadege keṟetuṁbade yidare koṭige nīru sarideyaū gadeyanu Anubhavisauḷavaru niṁma dasavaṁdada gade holavanū māḍuva vokalu gaḷige maneyanū kaṭuvudake sthaḷavanū tōṟisi koḍaluḷavaru Ā vokala kayalū manedeṟi
biṭi biḍāra kāṇike kaṁdāya Enanū nālukoḷa saladu yī kaṭu goḍageya gade holau nimage ĀcaṁdrākkasthāyiĀgi niṁma putrapautra (paraṁ)paraṁparābhiUraddhiyāgi dāna vikrayaṁ gaḷige yōgyavahaṁtāgi salaluḷadu
Eṁdu voḍaṁbaṭu koṭa kaṭugoḍageya sādhanayiṁ topudare sākṣigaḷu muḷuvāgila kalamaṭhada lakṣminārāyaṇa tīrtha śrīpādavoḍeyaru Aṁnadāta voḍeyara makaḷu dēvarāyagaḷu lakhapa
gaḷa makaḷu Aciya tiṁmaṇagaḷu kāunātha dēvagaḷa makaḷu ceṁnayagaḷu yiṁtivaru bhayānumatadiṁ puṭarasara maga dēvarasanu suhastada vopa śrī nārasihva kāṇiyāci
kāṛa naṁbigaḷa voppagaḷu Apaciya baraha Antappana baraha sākṣigaḷa vopagaḷu voḍeyara vopa raghumadhagataṁ lōka sākṣiṇā dēvarāyagaḷa sākṣi tiṁmayana sākṣi
śrī kadiri nārasihva maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.378 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
